reel_ending: PTI, BSTC, B.Ed, ANM aur CET ki taiyari ke liye Positron Academy ko Follow karein.
cta: ✅ Daily guidance ke liye humein Follow karein.
📩 Admission ke liye DM karein: ADMISSION

educational.label: Educational Reel
hooks: 🎯 {course} aspirants: kya aap yeh scoring step follow kar rahe hain?
📚 {course} preparation ko smart banana hai? Yeh tip save karein.
⚡ {course} mein better score ke liye aaj se yeh habit shuru karein.
values: Simple plan: concept samjhein, short notes banayein aur timed practice se revision check karein. {educational_tip}
Aaj ka action step: 25 minute focused study + 10 practice questions + 5 minute error review. {educational_tip}

student_success.label: Student Success Story
hooks: 🌟 Student Progress Spotlight: chhoti consistency, bada result.
🏆 {course} success ka secret talent nahi—daily discipline hai.
👏 Har mock test ek naya chance hai: improve, repeat, succeed.
values: Progress ka repeatable formula: {success_focus} Har week apna score compare karke next target set karein.
Real progress tab dikhti hai jab student apni galtiyon ko note karke next test mein unhe repeat nahi karta. {success_focus}
Apni weekly progress likhein: attempted questions, accuracy aur weak topics. {success_focus}

admission.label: Admission Information
hooks: 📢 {course} admission ki planning kar rahe hain? Pehle yeh checklist dekhein.
📝 {course} admission: documents aur guidance ko last day ke liye mat chhodiye.
🚨 {course} aspirants—admission process samajhna preparation jitna hi zaroori hai.
values: Eligibility, current dates aur required documents official notification se verify karein. Personal guidance ke liye Positron Academy se sampark karein. {admission_steps}
Document folder ready rakhein aur form submit karne se pehle har detail double-check karein. {admission_steps}

trending_funny.label: Trending/Funny Educational
hooks: 😂 Jab timetable 6 ghante ka ho aur padhai 16 minute ki...
😅 Exam kal ho aur dimaag bole: ek reel aur dekh lete hain!
📱 POV: phone silent kiya aur focus mode finally ON ho gaya.
values: Relatable hai, lekin comeback simple hai: {funny_focus}
Meme khatam, ab 25-minute focus sprint shuru. {funny_focus}

courses.educational_tip: Physical test ke saath theory syllabus, previous papers aur recovery routine ko weekly plan mein balance karein.
courses.success_focus: fitness log, topic-wise practice aur weekly mock analysis.
courses.admission_steps: PTI eligibility, application dates, physical criteria aur document list ko official notification se verify karein.
courses.funny_focus: running shoes ready rakhein aur theory notes ko bhi daily time dein.

courses.educational_tip: Mental Ability, Rajasthan GK, Teaching Aptitude aur Language sections ko rotation mein revise karein.
courses.success_focus: daily Rajasthan GK revision, timed quizzes aur accuracy tracking.
courses.admission_steps: BSTC eligibility, counselling stages, choice filling aur required documents ko official portal par confirm karein.
courses.funny_focus: Rajasthan GK ke 10 questions abhi solve karein—save ki hui reel baad mein bhi rahegi.

courses.educational_tip: Teaching Aptitude, reasoning, language aur general awareness ko topic-wise questions ke saath prepare karein.
courses.success_focus: concept clarity, previous-paper practice aur incorrect answers ka revision.
courses.admission_steps: B.Ed entrance, counselling, college choice aur document verification ki current details official notification se check karein.
courses.funny_focus: teacher banne ki preparation mein apne distraction ko pehle discipline sikhayein.

courses.educational_tip: Health basics, nutrition, community health aur general science ke short notes ko regular revise karein.
courses.success_focus: diagram-based revision, health-topic flashcards aur weekly self-tests.
courses.admission_steps: ANM eligibility, age criteria, merit/entrance process aur document requirements official source se verify karein.
courses.funny_focus: notes ko ICU mein jaane se bachayein—roz 20 minute revision dein.

courses.educational_tip: Rajasthan GK, reasoning, maths, Hindi aur English ke liye sectional targets aur mock-test analysis rakhein.
courses.success_focus: speed-accuracy balance, error notebook aur full-length mock routine.
courses.admission_steps: CET notification, eligibility, application window aur exam pattern ko official recruitment portal se confirm karein.
courses.funny_focus: guesswork kam karein, elimination technique aur timed practice zyada karein.

profile_optimization.recommendation: High-contrast Positron Academy logo use karein; mobile size par bhi naam readable ho.
Bio mein {whatsapp_link} add karein aur pre-filled message 'Namaste, mujhe course details chahiye' use karein.
Bio mein PTI | BSTC | B.Ed | ANM | CET ko clear line mein dikhayein.
Sirf verified student consent aur accurate result details ke saath Result highlight banayein.
Eligibility, documents, process aur current notices ke liye Admission highlight maintain karein.

poll_ideas: Aaj ka study target complete hua? — Haan / Abhi kar raha hoon
Sabse tough section? — Rajasthan GK / Reasoning
Next live doubt class kis course par? — PTI / BSTC
Mock test kab dena pasand karte hain? — Morning / Evening
Admission help chahiye? — DM karunga / WhatsApp karunga
story_ideas: One-question quiz with answer in the next story
Verified student progress/result card with consent
daily_posting_recommendations: 7:00–8:00 AM IST: study-tip story and daily poll
6:00–7:30 PM IST: one primary feed post or reel
8:30–9:00 PM IST: CTA story with DM and WhatsApp link
Target: 1 reel + 1 feed image per day, supported by 3–5 stories; review Insights weekly
reel_topic_suggestions: Three mistakes aspirants should stop this week
